sql:
WITH EVENTS_20210119 AS (
  SELECT
    user_pseudo_id
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20201231' AND '20210107'
    AND event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT
        1
      FROM
        UNNEST(event_params) AS params
      WHERE
        params.key = 'engagement_time_msec'
        AND SAFE_CAST(params.value.int_value AS INT64) > 0
    )
),
EVENTS_20210119 AS (
  SELECT
    user_pseudo_id
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20210106' AND '20210107'
    AND event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT
        1
      FROM
        UNNEST(event_params) AS params
      WHERE
        params.key = 'engagement_time_msec'
        AND SAFE_CAST(params.value.int_value AS INT64) > 0
    )
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT e7.user_pseudo_id) AS distinct_pseudo_users
FROM
  EVENTS_20210119 e7
LEFT JOIN
  EVENTS_20210119 e2
ON
  e7.user_pseudo_id = e2.user_pseudo_id
WHERE
  e2.user_pseudo_id IS NULL;

sql:
WITH customer_purchases AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(hit.page.pagePath, hit.product.productName, hit.product.productRevenue) AS product_info) AS products
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20160801`
  WHERE
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), DAY) BETWEEN DATE '2016-08-01' AND DATE '2016-08-31'
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM UNNEST(hits) AS hit
      WHERE hit.product.productName = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
    )
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
filtered_purchases AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    ARRAY_AGG(product_info) AS filtered_products
  FROM
    customer_purchases,
    UNNEST(products) AS product_info
  WHERE
    product_info.productName != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
top_selling_product AS (
  SELECT
    product_info.productName,
    SUM(product_info.productRevenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    filtered_purchases,
    UNNEST(filtered_products) AS product_info
  GROUP BY
    product_info.productName
  ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  productName,
  total_revenue
FROM
  top_selling_product;

    UNNEST(products) AS product_info
  WHERE

  GROUP BY

    total_revenue DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  productName,
  total_revenue
FROM
  top_selling_product;

sql:
WITH GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source AS trafficSource,
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_transaction_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20160801`
  WHERE
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), YEAR) = DATE '2017-01-01'
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource, month
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource,
    SUM(total_transaction_revenue) AS totals
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource,
    MAX(total_transaction_revenue) AS visitStartTime,
    MIN(total_transaction_revenue) AS visitStartTime
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource
)
SELECT
  yr.trafficSource,
  yr.totals,
  (mm.visitStartTime - mm.visitStartTime) / 1000000 AS revenue_difference_in_millions
FROM
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 yr
JOIN
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019 mm
ON
  yr.trafficSource = mm.trafficSource
ORDER BY
  yr.totals DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:
WITH monthly_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source AS traffic_source,
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_transaction_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20160801`
  WHERE
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), YEAR) = DATE '2017-01-01'
  GROUP BY
    traffic_source, month
),
yearly_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    traffic_source,
    SUM(total_transaction_revenue) AS total_yearly_revenue
  FROM
    monthly_revenue
  GROUP BY
    traffic_source
),
max_min_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    traffic_source,
    MAX(total_transaction_revenue) AS max_monthly_revenue,
    MIN(total_transaction_revenue) AS min_monthly_revenue
  FROM
    monthly_revenue
  GROUP BY
    traffic_source
)
SELECT
  yr.traffic_source,
  yr.total_yearly_revenue,
  (mm.max_monthly_revenue - mm.min_monthly_revenue) / 1000000 AS revenue_difference_in_millions
FROM
  yearly_revenue yr
JOIN
  max_min_revenue mm
ON
  yr.traffic_source = mm.traffic_source
ORDER BY
  yr.total_yearly_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH first_visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), DAY)) AS first_visit_date
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
first_transactions AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), DAY)) AS first_transaction_date,
    device.deviceCategory AS device_category
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201702*`,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit
  WHERE
    hit.transaction.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId, device.deviceCategory
)
SELECT
  fv.fullVisitorId,
  DATE_DIFF(ft.first_transaction_date, fv.first_visit_date, DAY) AS days_elapsed,
  ft.device_category
FROM
  first_visits fv
JOIN
  first_transactions ft
ON
  fv.fullVisitorId = ft.fullVisitorId
ORDER BY
  fv.fullVisitorId;

sql:
SELECT
  product.productName,
  SUM(product.productQuantity) AS totalQuantity
FROM
  `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201608*`,
  UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
  UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
WHERE
  product.productName NOT LIKE '%YouTube%'
GROUP BY
  product.productName
ORDER BY
  totalQuantity DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
SELECT
  next_page.pagePath AS next_page_path,
  MAX(home_page_time) AS max_time_spent_on_home_page
FROM (
  SELECT
    f.fullVisitorId,
    f.visitId,
    f.visitStartTime,
    f.hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath AS home_page_path,
    f.hits[OFFSET(0)].time AS home_page_time,
    f.hits[OFFSET(1)].page.pagePath AS next_page
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201701*`
  WHERE
    f.trafficSource.campaign CONTAINS 'Data Share'
    AND f.hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath STARTS WITH '/home'
    AND ARRAY_LENGTH(f.hits) > 1
) AS subquery
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_spent_on_home_page DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:
SELECT
  next_page.pagePath AS next_page_path,
  MAX(home_page_time) AS max_time_spent_on_home_page
FROM (
  SELECT
    f.fullVisitorId,
    f.visitId,
    f.visitStartTime,
    f.hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath AS home_page_path,
    f.hits[OFFSET(0)].time AS home_page_time,
    f.hits[OFFSET(1)].page.pagePath AS next_page
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201701*`
  WHERE
    f.trafficSource.campaign CONTAINS 'Data Share'
    AND f.hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath STARTS WITH '/home'
    AND ARRAY_LENGTH(f.hits) > 1
) AS subquery
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_spent_on_home_page DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), MONTH) AS month,
    totals.pageviews,
    CASE
      WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS classification
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20160801`
  WHERE
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), MONTH) BETWEEN DATE '2017-06-01' AND DATE '2017-07-31'
    AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    fullVisitorId,
    SUM(pageviews) AS total_pageviews,
    classification
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    month,
    fullVisitorId,
    classification
),
GA_SESSIONS_20161019 AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    classification,
    AVG(total_pageviews) AS avg_pageviews
  FROM
    GA_SESSIONS_20161019
  GROUP BY
    month,
    classification
)
SELECT
  month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN classification = 'purchase' THEN avg_pageviews END) AS avg_pageviews_purchase,
  MAX(CASE WHEN classification = 'non_purchase' THEN avg_pageviews END) AS avg_pageviews_non_purchase
FROM
  GA_SESSIONS_20161019
GROUP BY
  month
ORDER BY
  month;
original_sql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), MONTH) AS month,
    totals.pageviews,
    CASE
      WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS classification
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20160801`
  WHERE
    DATE_TRUNC(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE), MONTH) BETWEEN DATE '2017-06-01' AND DATE '2017-07-31'
    AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL
),
visitor_pageviews AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    fullVisitorId,
    SUM(pageviews) AS total_pageviews,
    classification
  FROM
    sessions
  GROUP BY
    month,
    fullVisitorId,
    classification
),
monthly_averages AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    classification,
    AVG(total_pageviews) AS avg_pageviews
  FROM
    visitor_pageviews
  GROUP BY
    month,
    classification
)
SELECT
  month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN classification = 'purchase' THEN avg_pageviews END) AS avg_pageviews_purchase,
  MAX(CASE WHEN classification = 'non_purchase' THEN avg_pageviews END) AS avg_pageviews_non_purchase
FROM
  monthly_averages
GROUP BY
  month
ORDER BY
  month;

sql:
WITH user_last_event AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MAX(visitStartTime) AS last_visit_time,
    MAX(visitStartTime) AS last_event_time,
    MAX(visitStartTime) AS last_transaction_time
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201608*`
  WHERE
    device.isMobile = TRUE
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
user_first_visit AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201608*`
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
user_events AS (
  SELECT
    ule.fullVisitorId,
    ule.last_event_time,
    ufv.first_visit_time,
    ule.last_transaction_time
  FROM
    user_last_event ule
  JOIN
    user_first_visit ufv
  ON
    ule.fullVisitorId = ufv.fullVisitorId
)
SELECT
  fullVisitorId,
  DATE_DIFF(SAFE_CAST(last_event_time AS TIMESTAMP), SAFE_CAST(first_visit_time AS TIMESTAMP), DAY) AS days_between
FROM
  user_events
ORDER BY
  days_between DESC
LIMIT 1;

  WHERE

  GROUP BY

),
user_first_visit AS (

    MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201608*`
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
user_events AS (
  SELECT
    ule.fullVisitorId,
    ule.last_event_time,
    ufv.first_visit_time,
    ule.last_transaction_time
  FROM
    user_last_event ule
  JOIN
    user_first_visit ufv
  ON
    ule.fullVisitorId = ufv.fullVisitorId
)
SELECT
  fullVisitorId,
  DATE_DIFF(SAFE_CAST(last_event_time AS TIMESTAMP), SAFE_CAST(first_visit_time AS TIMESTAMP), DAY) AS days_between
FROM
  user_events
ORDER BY
  days_between DESC
LIMIT 1;
